B

BaseAction<S,R> - Class in kafe
BaseAction is the unified base class for all action phases.
BaseAction(String, Function<R, R>) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseAction
 
BaseCheck<R> - Class in kafe
BaseCheck is the unified base class for all verification phases.
BaseCheck(String, Function<R, Object>) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseCheck
 
BaseConfirm<I,S,R> - Class in kafe
BaseConfirm for TDT pattern - independent implementation Similar to BaseGiven but for table-driven testing
BaseConfirm(List<String>, List<List<Object>>, Function<S, R>, Object) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseConfirm
 
BaseDescribe<I,S,R> - Class in kafe
BaseDescribe extends BaseSetup for Describe-It pattern.
BaseDescribe(List<String>, List<BaseIt<R>>, Function<S, R>, Object) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseDescribe
 
BaseExpected<R> - Class in kafe
BaseExpected extends BaseCheck for TDT pattern.
BaseExpected(String, Function<R, Object>) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseExpected
 
BaseGiven<I,S,R> - Class in kafe
BaseGiven extends BaseSetup to support BDD pattern.
BaseGiven(List<String>, List<BaseWhen<S, R>>, List<BaseThen<R>>, Function<S, R>, Object) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseGiven
 
BaseIt<R> - Class in kafe
BaseIt extends BaseAction for Describe-It pattern.
BaseIt(String, Function<R, R>) - Constructor for class kafe.BaseIt
 
BaseSetup<I,S,R> - Class in kafe
BaseSetup is the unified base class for all setup phases.

BaseShould extends BaseAction for TDT pattern.
